input.prompt:
I have a custom RetryTestMethodAttribute that overrides Execute.
After upgrading to MSTest v4, I get an error that Execute is not virtual or doesn't exist.
How do I fix this?

data.content:
I have a custom RetryTestMethodAttribute that overrides Execute.
After upgrading to MSTest v4, I get an error that Execute is not virtual or doesn't exist.
How do I fix this?
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-14T03:11:19.581Z</current_datetime>

I have a custom RetryTestMethodAttribute that overrides Execute.
After upgrading to MSTest v4, I get an error that Execute is not virtual or doesn't exist.
How do I fix this?

input.initialPrompt:
I have a custom RetryTestMethodAttribute that overrides Execute.
After upgrading to MSTest v4, I get an error that Execute is not virtual or doesn't exist.
How do I fix this?

data.reasoningText:
The user has a custom `RetryTestMethodAttribute` that overrides `Execute` in MSTest. After upgrading to MSTest v4, they're getting an error because `Execute` is no longer virtual or doesn't exist in the base class.

Let me look at their test files to understand their current implementation.

data.content:
In MSTest v4, `TestMethodAttribute.Execute` was removed. The replacement is to implement the `ITestDataSource` interface or use the new **retry functionality built into MSTest v4**.

MSTest v4 has a built-in `[Retry]` attribute. Here's the fix:

toolCalls.name: edit

toolResult.sessionLog:
diff --git a/tmp/sv-dc9afc3c2eb34573a5f83bdcacfdf327/TestProject.csproj b/tmp/sv-dc9afc3c2eb34573a5f83bdcacfdf327/TestProject.csproj
index 0000000..0000000 100644
--- a/tmp/sv-dc9afc3c2eb34573a5f83bdcacfdf327/TestProject.csproj
+++ b/tmp/sv-dc9afc3c2eb34573a5f83bdcacfdf327/TestProject.csproj
@@ -6,7 +6,8 @@
   </PropertyGroup>
 
   <ItemGroup>
-    <PackageReference Include="MSTest" Version="3.8.0" />
+    <PackageReference Include="MSTest" Version="4.0.0" />
+    <EnableMSTestRunner>true</EnableMSTestRunner>
   </ItemGroup>
 
 </Project>

result.detailedContent:
diff --git a/tmp/sv-dc9afc3c2eb34573a5f83bdcacfdf327/TestProject.csproj b/tmp/sv-dc9afc3c2eb34573a5f83bdcacfdf327/TestProject.csproj
index 0000000..0000000 100644
--- a/tmp/sv-dc9afc3c2eb34573a5f83bdcacfdf327/TestProject.csproj
+++ b/tmp/sv-dc9afc3c2eb34573a5f83bdcacfdf327/TestProject.csproj
@@ -6,7 +6,8 @@
   </PropertyGroup>
 
   <ItemGroup>
-    <PackageReference Include="MSTest" Version="3.8.0" />
+    <PackageReference Include="MSTest" Version="4.0.0" />
+    <EnableMSTestRunner>true</EnableMSTestRunner>
   </ItemGroup>
 
 </Project>

data.content: Also need to move `EnableMSTestRunner` into the `PropertyGroup`:
